issues.description: Release docs overstate the held-release state: docs/repository-reference.md and the set's change-log.md stated that vsix-v0.29.0 was already pushed/published on 2026-06-11, but per the spec's held-release mechanics (and the session's own account) the tag push happens only AFTER verification and the close-out commit - so the committed documentation asserted a release step that had not yet occurred.
issues.verificationMethod: Static review of the Session 4 diff (repository-reference.md release-status rows + change-log.md release header) against the spec's 'Held release' step and the stated push-after-close-out sequencing.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Re-read the release-state wording in both docs: pre-push state ('UAT passed, publish authorized, tag push follows close-out') before the tag exists; 'pushed/published' only after the publish workflow actually completes.
issues.resolution_notes: Both documents reworded to the truthful pre-push state (UAT passed 2026-06-11; publish operator-authorized in-session; vsix-v0.29.0 tag push follows the Session 4 close-out). The 'published + run id' facts are recorded in a small post-publish follow-up commit only after publish-vscode.yml completes successfully. Round 2 (s4-verification-round-2.md) confirmed the fix and returned VERIFIED.
